text: وَ نَجِّنَا بِرَحْمَتِکَ‌ مِنَ‌ الْقَوْمِ‌ الْکَافِرِينَ‌

en.ahmedali: And deliver us by Your grace from a people who do not believe."
en.ahmedraza: “And with Your mercy, rescue us from the disbelievers.”
en.arberry: and deliver us by Thy mercy from the people of the unbelievers.'
en.daryabadi: And deliver us in Thine mercy from the disbelieving people.
en.hilali: "And save us by Your Mercy from the disbelieving folk."
en.itani: “And deliver us, by Your mercy, from the disbelieving people.”
en.maududi: and deliver us, through Your mercy, from the unbelievers.'
en.mubarakpuri: "And save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving folk."
en.pickthall: And, of Thy mercy, save us from the folk that disbelieve.
en.qarai: and deliver us by Your mercy from the faithless lot.’
en.qaribullah: Save us, through Your Mercy, from the unbelieving nation'
en.sahih: And save us by Your mercy from the disbelieving people."
en.sarwar: Lord, save us, through Your mercy, from the disbelieving people."
en.shakir: And do Thou deliver us by Thy mercy from the unbelieving people.
en.wahiduddin: And deliver us by Your mercy from the people who deny the truth."
en.yusufali: "And deliver us by Thy Mercy from those who reject (Thee)."
fa.ansarian: و ما را به رحمتت از گروه کافران رهایی ده.
fa.ayati: و به رحمت خود ما را از اين كافران رهايى بخش.
fa.bahrampour: و ما را به رحمت خويش از قوم كافر رهايى بخش
fa.fooladvand: «و ما را به رحمت خويش، از گروه كافران نجات ده.»
fa.ghomshei: و ما را به رحمت و لطف خود از شر کافران نجات ده.
fa.khorramdel: و ما را با فضل و رحمت خود از دست مردمان کافر نجات بده.
fa.khorramshahi: و ما را به رحمت خویش از خدانشناسان رهایی بخش‌
fa.makarem: و ما را با رحمتت از (دست) قوم کافر رهایی بخش!
fa.moezzi: و بِرهان ما را به رحمت خود از گروه کافران‌
fa.mojtabavi: و ما را به مِهر و بخشايش خود از گروه كافران برهان.
fa.sadeqi: « و ما را به رحمت خویش، از گروه کافران نجات‌بخش.»
